basic_details.post_name: Engineering Associate (Civil), Engineering Associate (Electrical), Engineering Associate (Horticulture)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only. No physical application will be entertained for this engagement.
Visit the official application portal at https://recruitment.ulbharyana.gov.in.
Register by entering the required details before filling the online application form.
After successful registration, sign in using your credentials.
Fill in the online application form completely, including all required details.
Upload the required photograph, signature and documents as per specifications.
Click the "Submit Application" button. A Unique Application Number will be generated on submission.
Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: Only online applications submitted before the closing date will be accepted; applications sent in any other form will not be entertained and will be deemed rejected. Applications submitted without a photograph or signature will be summarily rejected. It is the applicant's responsibility to ensure that all details are successfully submitted online before the closing date. Applicants should check their eligibility for the specific post before applying. If a candidate submits fake documents or certificates, strict legal action will be initiated, which may include termination of engagement. Candidates are advised to regularly visit the Department's website for updates on the date of test, result, interview, and final selection.

content_sections.heading: ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment 2026: Overview
content_sections.text: The table below summarises the key details of this ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment.

rows.details: Directorate of Urban Local Bodies, Haryana, Panchkula
Engineering Associate (Civil), Engineering Associate (Electrical), Engineering Associate (Horticulture)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Only one confirmed date is available in the current notice.

rows.event: Last date to submit online application

content_sections.heading: ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 150 vacancies have been announced under the ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment 2026 for posts across the Urban Local Bodies Department, Haryana.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility for ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Preference in selection will be given to candidates having a Doctor of Philosophy (PhD), a Master's Degree, or who were toppers of their Bachelor's Degree in the prescribed streams.

rows.required_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. in Civil Engineering from any recognized university or institution in India.
B.Tech/B.E. in Electrical Engineering from any recognized university or institution in India.

First class degree in Agriculture with specialization in Horticulture; or M.Sc. degree in Horticulture including Floriculture and Olericulture; or M.Sc. degree in Botany with Horticulture as one of the subjects, from any recognized university or institution in India.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process for this Engineering Associate recruitment involves the following officially confirmed stages: Applications will be scrutinised at the Directorate of Urban Local Bodies level by a committee, and candidates will be shortlisted based on merit. The written test of shortlisted candidates will be conducted through a reputed Government agency, Government-controlled agency, or an institution selected by the Department. Preference will be given to candidates having a PhD, Master's Degree, or who were toppers of their Bachelor's Degree in the prescribed streams. The decision of the Department will be final, and no further correspondence will be entertained. Selection for the Horticulture post is based on marks scored across two parts, with a grand total of 100 marks. Candidates must obtain at least 35 marks in Part-A to be shortlisted for the Part-B written examination, and at least 35 marks in Part-B to be shortlisted for the engagement list. The final cut-off list will be prepared based on the total marks (70 marks and above) obtained by candidates.

tables.caption: Evaluation Criteria: Engineering Associate (Civil and Electrical)

rows.evaluation_basis: As per GATE Score of the last two years.

rows.component: Percentage of marks obtained in relevant basic qualification × 0.35

rows.part: Experience of at least one year in relevant field with Central/State Government, Regional Development Authorities, PSUs, Government Authorities or Government SPVs in India (no marks if experience is less than one year)
Additional experience in relevant field (1 mark per year above minimum required, up to 5 marks; no marks if experience is less than one year)

content_sections.heading: Tenure of Engagement
content_sections.text: Selected candidates willing to work in any municipality or other office under the Urban Local Bodies Department will be engaged initially for one year, which may be extended up to three years based on year-to-year satisfactory performance. Candidates must provide their choice of three places of posting. Either party may terminate the engagement by giving a mandatory minimum of 30 days' notice. The contractual services can be terminated at any time before the expiry of the contract period on account of poor performance, misconduct, or as per requirement, by serving 30 days' written notice.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online only. No physical application will be entertained for this engagement. Visit the official application portal at https://recruitment.ulbharyana.gov.in. Register by entering the required details before filling the online application form. After successful registration, sign in using your credentials. Fill in the online application form completely, including all required details. Upload the required photograph, signature and documents as per specifications. Click the "Submit Application" button. A Unique Application Number will be generated on submission. Keep a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Latest passport-size colour photograph with a light background, covering 80% of the candidate's face. Scanned copy of signature, signed on white paper with black ink pen, cropped to show only the signature. Self-certified copy of the detailed marksheet/degree qualification certificate (both sides required if it contains GPA/CGPA). Self-certified copy of experience certificate(s), if applicable.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications submitted before the closing date will be accepted; applications sent in any other form will not be entertained and will be deemed rejected. Applications submitted without a photograph or signature will be summarily rejected. It is the applicant's responsibility to ensure that all details are successfully submitted online before the closing date. Applicants should check their eligibility for the specific post before applying. If a candidate submits fake documents or certificates, strict legal action will be initiated, which may include termination of engagement. Candidates are advised to regularly visit the Department's website for updates on the date of test, result, interview, and final selection.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in the ULB Haryana Engineering Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 150 vacancies have been announced, including 100 Civil, 30 Electrical and 20 Horticulture posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the Engineering Associate posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 06 August 2026. No physical applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What qualification is required for the Engineering Associate (Civil) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E. in Civil Engineering from any recognized university or institution in India.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for Civil and Electrical posts?
faq.answer: Selection for Civil and Electrical Engineering Associate posts is based on the candidate's GATE Score of the last two years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the monthly remuneration for these posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly remuneration of ₹30,000/- across all three posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the tenure of engagement for Engineering Associates?
faq.answer: The engagement is initially for one year, extendable up to three years based on satisfactory yearly performance.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the Urban Local Bodies Haryana recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through https://recruitment.ulbharyana.gov.in by registering, signing in, filling the application form, and submitting it before 06 August 2026.
